codeActions.title: Extract JSX to new component
codeActions.description: Extracts the selected JSX into a new React functional component and replaces the selection with the new component tag

codeActions.title: Extract custom hook
codeActions.description: Extracts selected stateful logic (useState, useEffect, etc.) into a new custom hook function prefixed with 'use'

codeActions.title: Wrap with React.memo
codeActions.description: Wraps the component with React.memo() for performance optimization by preventing unnecessary re-renders when props are unchanged

codeActions.title: Wrap with Suspense boundary
codeActions.description: Wraps selected JSX with a React.Suspense boundary and a fallback loading component

codeActions.title: Wrap with ErrorBoundary
codeActions.description: Wraps selected JSX with an ErrorBoundary component to catch rendering errors in the subtree

codeActions.title: Convert class component to function component
codeActions.description: Converts a class-based React component to a functional component with hooks (useState for state, useEffect for lifecycle methods)

codeActions.title: Wrap callback with useCallback
codeActions.description: Wraps an inline function or arrow function passed as a prop with useCallback to memoize it and prevent unnecessary child re-renders

codeActions.title: Wrap value with useMemo
codeActions.description: Wraps a computed value with useMemo to memoize the result and avoid expensive recalculations on every render

codeActions.title: Organize imports
codeActions.description: Sorts and groups React imports: React first, then third-party modules, then local imports, removing any unused imports

codeActions.title: Fix missing key prop in list
codeActions.description: Adds a unique key prop to JSX elements rendered inside a .map() call to fix the 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' warning

codeActions.title: Fix missing dependency in useEffect
codeActions.description: Adds missing variables to the useEffect dependency array based on the variables used inside the effect callback

codeActions.title: Convert to controlled component
codeActions.description: Converts an uncontrolled form input to a controlled component by adding value and onChange props bound to state

codeActions.title: Wrap with forwardRef
codeActions.description: Wraps the component with React.forwardRef to allow parent components to access a child ref

codeActions.title: Add displayName
codeActions.description: Adds a displayName static property to the component for better debugging in React DevTools

codeActions.title: Convert to lazy-loaded component
codeActions.description: Converts a static import of a component to a dynamic import using React.lazy() for code splitting

codeActions.title: Add error boundary wrapper
codeActions.description: Adds try-catch pattern in async handlers or wraps components with error boundaries for better error handling

codeActions.title: Fix all auto-fixable issues
codeActions.description: Applies all automatic fixes including missing keys, unused imports, missing dependencies, and formatting issues

codeActions.title: Extract inline styles to object
codeActions.description: Extracts inline style objects from JSX elements into a named constant for better readability and reusability

codeActions.title: Convert useState to useReducer
codeActions.description: Converts multiple related useState calls into a single useReducer with typed actions for complex state management

codeActions.title: Add TypeScript types to component props
codeActions.description: Generates a TypeScript interface for the component props based on prop usage within the component
